text:
[residual] Push failing on missing/expired login must report honestly (failure-recovery/external-env), not an authn surface this command owns.
[residual] Pathological/cyclic local chain runaway, but guarded by depth-cap under resource-exhaustion/boundary-edge.
[residual] Dev own WI text could contain personal notes surfacing in the ledger, but that content predates this command and is unchanged.
[residual] git push distributes repo code to a remote, but that governance is pre-existing repo policy outside this command.
[close_reason] No identity surface; git push delegates to git ambient cred helper which this change neither manages nor verifies. Single-developer local CLI.
[close_reason] Single-user local dev CLI; no network server, no multi-user surface, no untrusted input (only the dev own wi id + own store/repo). No adversarial actor in the threat model.
[close_reason] Operates on the dev own WI metadata/ledger/git state; ingests and emits no personal or third-party data.
[close_reason] Single-developer local dev tooling; no regulated data class, no jurisdictional control surface.
[intent_drift] H3: intent AC id(s) missing from completion (scope shrink): ac-2, ac-3, ac-4, ac-5
